overview: This image shows a bobcat peering through a window at a domestic cat. Bobcats are wild predators found across North America, known for their tufted ears, spotted coats, and short, "bobbed" tails. While shy, bobcats may approach residential areas, especially in places like Tucson, AZ. Important safety note: Bobcats are wild animals and can be dangerous to domestic pets; they are known to prey on house cats.
